The '''capital city''' of [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]] was a pleasant [[City/Legends|city]] that served as the seat of government for the planet.

==Characteristics==
Urban area mingled with park space inside the city, while it was surrounded by craggy hills and grasslands on its outskirts. A river ran through the city, and at its bend was situated [[Government Mound]].

The [[Abridon Government Center|Government Center]], the planet's capitol building, was situated at the summit of the hill and fronted with gardens. On the southeast edge of the city was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base.

==History==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] the [[Abridon Nationalists]] [[Uprising on Abridon|seized]] the capital while [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces set up a series of bases around the city.

However, the capital reverted to Imperial control in a matter of days when [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]] arrived and [[Massacre on Abridon|eradicated]] the Rebel contingent. During the fighting, he also set up a base in the gardens at the foot of Government Mound. A [[Abridon holding camp|holding camp]] on the eastern border of the city was another Imperial addition.

The city was [[Liberation of Abridon|recaptured]] by the Rebellion shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] when Tantor, now a defector, returned to the planet at the head of a Rebel force. He drove the Empire out of the capital and the industrial center of [[Sayan]], putting control of the planet firmly in the Rebellion's hands.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
